products.name: DermaLume Pro Anti-Aging Device
products.description: LED anti-aging skincare device with multi-wavelength technology

reviews.title: Decent build quality, underwhelming results
reviews.review_text: The device is well-made and the app is nice, but after 6 weeks I haven't noticed the dramatic results advertised. Mild improvement in skin texture at best. At this price point, I expected more.

reviews.title: Overpriced for what it delivers
reviews.review_text: It's a nicely designed LED device but the anti-aging claims are overblown. I've seen some articles questioning the science behind the 'quantum technology' marketing. Wish I'd done more research before buying.
